title: Orchid Potting Mix 8L
features: Added Seramis granules for water management
Enriched with pine bark for airflow and drainage
description: From the manufacturer Westland Orchid Potting Mix Westland Orchid Potting Mix is a dry, free-draining peat free mix that is perfect for Orchids. This mix will prevent over watering and deters flies for healthier, happier plants. Enriched with our unique Seramis granules for superior water management, these granules absorb and store water and nutrients, and release them to keep Orchids hydrated and nourished. Added zinc complex promotes more root growth into your new potting mix, faster re-potting establishment and also boosts plant resilience. Key Benefits Enriched with Seramis granules for superior water management Perfect balance of aeration and drainage Reduces plant stress and boosts resilience Added zinc complex promotes root growth Peat free mix Westland Orchid Potting Mix What makes me unique? Orchids love being in a mix that that lets water run past their roots instead of sitting in a waterlogged pot. This dry, free-draining peat free potting mix prevents over watering and deters flies for healthier, happy plants. Added zinc complex promotes more root growth into your new potting mix, faster re-potting establishment and also boosts plant resilience. Rich in pine bark to create the perfect balance of aeration and drainage for healthy root development. How does Seramis work? Our unique Seramis granules absorb water and nutrients. They then release the water and nutrients when the plan needs it, keeping orchids hydrated and nourished. Potting & Re-potting Find a new pot, choose one with just enough room for the roots and fill one third of a pot with potting mix. Remove dead and shrivelled roots but leave potting mix attached to healthy plump white roots. Place the orchid in the pot and carefully spread out the roots. Gently hold the plant by its stem and fill around the roots. Tap the pot to settle the potting mix - do not firm down. Top Tips - Orchids may need anchoring in the pot with a stick or wire. Re-pot just after flowering or during the period when new growth and new roots appear. Tips & Advice Don't let orchids go hungry. Packed full of essential nutrients orchids need to thrive, feeding with Westland Orchid Feed is the secret to lush, healthy orchids. Don't let your plants get stressed! Under or over watering your plants can often lead to pest and disease problems. Use a Westland Watering Indicator so you know exactly when to water, they change colour when your plant needs a drink. Don't use me with ericaceous plants. Before use, re-work potting mix with hands to reconstitute Use in a well ventilated place and avoid breathing in dust. Wearing gloves is a good idea, and don't forget to wash your hands afterwards.
